title: Titlebar Changer
description: Minecraft mod that offers advanced customization of window appearance, including titlebar, title, and border colors. Full functionality is available only on Windows 11; on Windows 10, the mod's features are limited to changing the titlebar color to dark.
body:
# ūüĒĄTitlebar Changer

Personalize the look of your Minecraft **window titlebar** ‚ÄĒ tweak **colors, text, corners, and borders** on Windows.

- ūü™ü On **Windows 11**, the mod unlocks the full range of customization features, such as custom colors, rounded corners,
  and border styling.
- ūü™ü On **Windows 10**, support is limited by the operating system: you can only switch the titlebar between light and
  dark modes.

## ‚úÖ Requirements

* **Windows 10 or Windows 11** (other OS are not supported)
* One of: **Forge** or **Fabric/Quilt**
* (Optional, for in‚ÄĎgame settings): **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)**
* (Optional, Fabric/Quilt config UI): **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**

## ūüé® Examples

Below are examples of custom titlebar colors (Windows 11):

![Example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dTcj11Mz/images/e2474f65bd81adfd506e805b01041da6689eea2a.png)  
![Example 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dTcj11Mz/images/41a0e861c53ca0d9bf89373da2ca1fe1c1ec3771.png)  
![Example 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dTcj11Mz/images/efee6ce711fb1aad98828cf98deef3245b87c9db.png)

### ūüźĪ Fun Example
And here‚Äôs an extra ‚ÄĒ the *Titlebar Changer* with my cat wearing a crown ūüĎĎ

![Crowned Cat Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dTcj11Mz/images/dbfd816abc9dda0c55417cac5e8f8d36af3f72d1.jpeg)

## ūüĒó Source Code

The source code for the mod is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/Talor1n/TitlebarChanger). If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvements, please feel free to leave them in the Issues section on GitHub.

## ‚öôÔłŹ Configuration

You can configure the mod either **in‚ÄĎgame** (recommended) or by editing the **JSON** file.

### In‚ÄĎgame config

* **Forge:** Main Menu ‚Üí **Mods** ‚Üí *Titlebar Changer* ‚Üí **Config**
* **Fabric/Quilt:** Install **Mod Menu** + **Cloth Config**, then Main Menu ‚Üí **Mods** ‚Üí *Titlebar Changer*

![Settings Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dTcj11Mz/images/2e25b5a05f68ab8baf0a2cd05c6b757b54267dfd.png)

### Config file

The file lives at: **`config/titlebar_settings.json`**

```json5
{
  // Window Theme: LIGHT (0), DARK (1), CUSTOM (2)
  // Controls the overall appearance of the titlebar
  // Restriction: Custom only works on Windows 11+
  "theme": "1",

  // Window Corners: SYSTEM_DEFAULT (0), NO_ROUNDING (1), ROUNDED (2), ROUNDED_SMALL (3)
  // Controls how window corners are rendered
  // Restriction: Only works on Windows 11+
  "corner": "0",

  // Caption (titlebar) background color
  // Format: #RRGGBB
  // Restriction: Only works when theme is CUSTOM (2)
  "captionColor": "#FF0505",

  // Window border color
  // Format: #RRGGBB
  // Restriction: Only works when theme is CUSTOM (2)
  "borderColor": "#FF00FF",

  // Title text and button color
  // Format: #RRGGBB
  // Restriction: Only works when theme is CUSTOM (2)
  "textColor": "#FF00FF"
}
```

#### Option reference

| Option         | Values / Format                                                                | Notes                                                                                              |
|----------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `theme`        | `0` = Light ‚ÄĘ `1` = Dark ‚ÄĘ `2` = Custom                                        | On **Windows 10** only `0/1` are supported. Full customization (`2`) works only on **Windows 11**. |
| `corner`       | `0` = System default ‚ÄĘ `1` = No rounding ‚ÄĘ `2` = Rounded ‚ÄĘ `3` = Rounded small | Available only on **Windows 11**.                                                                  |
| `captionColor` | `#RRGGBB`                                                                      | Used only with `theme = 2` (Custom).                                                               |
| `borderColor`  | `#RRGGBB`                                                                      | Used only with `theme = 2` (Custom).                                                               |
| `textColor`    | `#RRGGBB`                                                                      | Used only with `theme = 2` (Custom).                                                               |

> Tip: restart the game after manual edits.

## ‚Ěď FAQ

**Does it work on Linux or macOS?**
The mod uses Windows APIs. On non‚ÄĎWindows systems it will **load in dormant mode** (inactive, no changes applied).

**Does it work in fullscreen?**
The titlebar is part of the **windowed** UI. Fullscreen modes that hide the window frame will also hide the titlebar.

**Can I use hex colors with alpha (#AARRGGBB)?**
No ‚ÄĒ use **`#RRGGBB`**.
